name: Analytics shows confidence calibration section
description: The Analytics page includes a Confidence Calibration section that shows either a calibration chart with bars comparing expected vs actual success rates across confidence levels 1-5, or a 'not enough data yet' message when fewer than 20 JOL-rated reviews exist.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Analytics link in the sidebar
Scroll down to the Confidence Calibration section

Verify a section titled 'Confidence Calibration' is present on the Analytics page showing EITHER a bar chart visualization with confidence levels (1 through 5) on the x-axis and paired bars (expected vs actual) per level plus a calibration deviation score, OR a 'not enough data yet' message explaining the minimum review count needed — confirming the metacognition feature rendered rather than being absent
